---
title: "Havey Canyon Loop (55% Gravel)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.83" data-elevation="2072.18">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.83</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2072.18 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#fee08b;">31%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>12.07</td>
      <td>64.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.32</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.96</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.20</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.98</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.30</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,141</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>40 ± 19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Park Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>259</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>8 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Havey Canyon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>450</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>14 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>198</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>39</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>28</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### With Rest Periods

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,141</td>
      <td>18.8</td>
      <td>122 ± 44</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Park Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>259</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>8 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Havey Canyon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>450</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>14 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>198</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>6.2</td>
      <td>36</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>39</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>28</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>4.3</td>
      <td>24</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>10.3</td>
      <td>54.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>17.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>5.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>5.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>3.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
